violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the retail cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2022

The floors under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The ceiling tiles in the mop sink area are in poor repair (missing, broken, old water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

Creamer was observed held at ( 44 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

Several beverage containers were observed stored on the floor in the retail and walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

The coffee station cooler in the retail area is in poor repair(ambient temperatures 44 degrees Fahrenheit. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2023
